title: United States Department of the Treasury Announces New Appointments
summary: Secretary Scott Bessent announced President Trump's intent to nominate Luke Pettit as Assistant Secretary for Financial Institutions and Jason De Sena Trennert as Assistant Secretary for Financial Markets at the U.S. Department of the Treasury. This is a personnel announcement announcing nominations, not a macro catalyst, policy decision, or market-moving release.
key_points: Published February 8, 2025 — approximately 14 months prior to today (2026-04-10), making this a historical record
Luke Pettit nominated for Assistant Secretary for Financial Institutions; background includes Senate Banking Committee economist, Bridgewater Associates, Federal Reserve Division of Monetary Affairs
Jason De Sena Trennert nominated for Assistant Secretary for Financial Markets; Chairman of Strategas Research Partners (co-founded 18 years ago, ranked #1 macroeconomic research shop)
Source is a Treasury Department homepage (featured_story) — a non-archivable personnel announcement
No economic data, policy decisions, or market-moving information contained in this source
why_it_matters: This is an administrative personnel announcement, not a macro catalyst. While the nominees' backgrounds suggest potential policy orientations, the source itself contains no current economic analysis, forecasts, or policy statements. It does not constitute actionable macro intelligence.
important_numbers: 18 years (co-founding tenure of Strategas Research Partners)
34 years (Wall Street experience of Jason De Sena Trennert)
